findingDetails.title: Parent validation fails: FRONTMATTER_MEMORY_BLOCK on resource-map.md
findingDetails.evidence: resource-map.md frontmatter missing trigger_phrases, importance_tier, contextType. Compare spec.md:12-14 which has all three. validate.sh --strict exits with FRONTMATTER_MEMORY_BLOCK: 1 issue. Contradicts 006-advisor-and-validate/implementation-summary.md:95 claim of '0 errors, 0 warnings.'
findingDetails.recommendation: Add trigger_phrases, importance_tier ('important'), and contextType ('implementation') to resource-map.md frontmatter YAML block.
findingDetails.affectedSurfaceHints: validate.sh binary gate; Phase 006 implementation-summary accuracy; generate-context.js memory indexing

findingDetails.title: Phase 002 implementation-summary frontmatter template contamination
findingDetails.evidence: Title line 2 contains '[template:level_1/implementation-summary.md]'. Trigger phrases lines 5-8 are template defaults. importance_tier line 9 is 'normal' (should be 'important'). contextType line 10 is 'general' (should be 'implementation'). SPECKIT_LEVEL line 36 (1) contradicts Level line 48 (2). Compare with 001-discovery-impact-map/implementation-summary.md:1-37 for correct customization.
findingDetails.recommendation: Replace title with 'Implementation Summary: Phase 002 Skill Folder Rename'. Replace trigger_phrases with ['082 phase 002', 'sk-prompt skill folder rename']. Set importance_tier to 'important', contextType to 'implementation'. Fix SPECKIT_LEVEL to 2.
findingDetails.affectedSurfaceHints: Memory search discoverability; doc consistency policy

noveltyJustification: Single new P2 finding (Phase 002 template contamination) discovered in documentation hygiene review. Pre-existing P1 carried forward from Iteration 1. No P0 or new P1 findings. Ratio 1.0 reflects single-weight new finding in a focused dimension — low absolute impact but valid novelty.

edgeCases.description: resource-map.md frontmatter pattern matches 070 precedent exactly (both lack trigger_phrases/importance_tier/contextType). Validator may have tightened since 070 completion.
edgeCases.resolution: Treat as pre-existing P1 — mirrors precedent but violates current validator

edgeCases.description: Phase 002 session_id is 'scaffold-scaffold/002-skill-folder-rename' vs other phases' 'codex-...' pattern
edgeCases.resolution: Correlated with template contamination; noted alongside P2 finding
